allow: Bash(mvn clean compile test -q && echo "BUILD & TESTS: PASSED")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT EXISTS \(SELECT FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'inventory'\);" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT id, stock, version FROM seckill;" 2>/dev/null || echo "psql not available")
Bash(kubectl delete namespace seckill 2>&1 && sleep 5 && kubectl delete pvc -l app=seckill-postgres -n seckill 2>&1 || echo "PVC 已清理")
Bash(kubectl get pvc -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "seckill-postgres" | head -30)
Bash(kubectl get secret seckill-db-secret -n seckill -o yaml 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl get configmap seckill-config -n seckill -o yaml 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl delete namespace seckill --ignore-not-found && sleep 3 && /Users/zhangtong/software/demos/demo8/k8s/deploy.sh 2>&1 | tail -80)
Bash(mvn clean package -DskipTests -B 2>&1 | tail -10 && docker build --platform linux/arm64 -t seckill-app:latest . 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(kubectl delete namespace seckill --ignore-not-found && sleep 2 && kubectl create ns seckill && kubectl apply -f k8s/secrets.yaml -f k8s/configmap.yaml -f k8s/rbac.yaml -f k8s/postgres.yaml -f k8s/redis.yaml -f k8s/kafka.yaml -f k8s/deployment.yaml -f k8s/hpa.yaml -n seckill 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl apply -f k8s/hpa.yaml -n seckill 2>&1 && sleep 30 && kubectl get pods -n seckill 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill deployment/seckill-app -- curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/seckill 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl get pods -n seckill | grep seckill-tables && kubectl logs job/create-seckill-tables -n seckill --tail=20 2>&1)

Bash(echo "=== Pod 状态 ===" && kubectl get pods -n seckill && echo "" && echo "=== 服务状态 ===" && kubectl get services -n seckill && echo "" && echo "=== 健康检查 ===" && kubectl exec -n seckill deployment/seckill-app -- curl -s http://localhost:8080/actuator/health)

Bash(chmod +x /Users/zhangtong/software/demos/demo8/k8s/test-seckill.sh /Users/zhangtong/software/demos/demo8/k8s/stress-test.sh && echo "脚本已创建，开始执行快速测试..." && /Users/zhangtong/software/demos/demo8/k8s/test-seckill.sh 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT * FROM seckill;" 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "\\\\dt" 2>&1)

Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "INSERT INTO seckill \(id, product_name, stock, start_time, end_time, version, created_at, updated_at\) VALUES \(1, 'iPhone 15 Pro', 100, NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '1 hour', NOW\(\) + INTERVAL '24 hour', 0, NOW\(\), NOW\(\)\) ON CONFLICT \(id\) DO NOTHING;" 2>&1)

Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "INSERT INTO inventory \(seckill_id, total_stock, available_stock, locked_stock, sold_stock, version\) VALUES \(1, 100, 100, 0, 0, 0\) ON CONFLICT \(seckill_id\) DO NOTHING;" 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT * FROM seckill; SELECT * FROM inventory;" 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-redis-0 -- redis-cli keys "*" 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-redis-0 -- redis-cli get "seckill:stock:1" 2>&1)
Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-redis-0 -- redis-cli SET "seckill:stock:1" "100" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-redis-0 -- redis-cli get "seckill:stock:1" 2>&1)

Bash(echo "=== Redis 库存 ===" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-redis-0 -- redis-cli get "seckill:stock:1" && echo "" && echo "=== 数据库库存 ===" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT seckill_id, total_stock, available_stock, locked_stock, sold_stock FROM inventory WHERE seckill_id = 1;" && echo "" && echo "=== 订单数 ===" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM seckill_order;")
Bash(kubectl logs -n seckill deployment/seckill-app --tail=100 2>&1 | grep -i "ERROR\\|Exception" | head -20)
Bash(mvn clean package -DskipTests -B 2>&1 | tail -5 && docker build --platform linux/arm64 -t seckill-app:latest . 2>&1 | tail -5 && kubectl rollout restart deployment/seckill-app -n seckill 2>&1)

Bash(kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "TRUNCATE seckill_order, seckill_result RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "UPDATE inventory SET available_stock=100, locked_stock=0, sold_stock=0, version=0 WHERE seckill_id=1;" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "UPDATE seckill SET stock=100 WHERE id=1;" 2>&1)

Bash(sleep 10 && echo "=== 数据库库存 ===" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT seckill_id, total_stock, available_stock, locked_stock, sold_stock FROM inventory WHERE seckill_id = 1;" && echo "" && echo "=== 订单数 ===" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-postgres-0 -- psql -U postgres -d seckill -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as order_count FROM seckill_order;" && echo "" && echo "=== Redis 库存 ===" && kubectl exec -n seckill seckill-redis-0 -- redis-cli get "seckill:stock:1")
Bash(mvn jacoco:report -q && echo "=== 覆盖率报告生成成功 ===" && ls -la target/site/jacoco/)
